project_common.outline_style: 2px solid outline included in sprite dimensions

shared_attributes.collision: ground provides landing reference, background is non-interactive

context.role: Provides depth through parallax scrolling, creates desert sky atmosphere
context.screen_position: Fills entire screen, sky is static solid color #F7F7F7, clouds scroll at 0.5x Current_Speed
context.usage_scenario: Always visible as backdrop, clouds (optional) spawn every 5-10 seconds at random heights (y=10-40px), scroll slower than ground for parallax effect

visual_specification.shape: Solid color sky with optional simple cloud shapes
visual_specification.texture: sky is flat solid color, clouds are simple pixel art silhouettes
visual_specification.outline: clouds have 2px outline included in dimensions

animation.description: Sky is static, clouds scroll left at Current_Speed * 0.5 (parallax), clouds respawn at right edge when exiting left, maximum 3 clouds on screen

visual_specification.details: Sky is solid #F7F7F7 background, clouds (optional) are simple rounded shapes in primary color, spawn randomly at y=10-40px, scroll at half speed of ground for depth perception, 30% spawn probability every 5-10 seconds

relationships.shared_with: Clouds use same primary color as obstacles
relationships.differences_from: ground scrolls at 1.0x speed, background clouds scroll at 0.5x speed (parallax), background has no collision, ground has collision at y=0

explicit_negations: no gradients in sky (solid color only)
no complex cloud shapes (simple silhouettes only)
no sun, moon, or other celestial objects
no more than 3 clouds on screen simultaneously
